topic: cool growing conditions and sparkling base-wine acidity
trigger_keywords: calidad de un espumoso de clima frío
alta acidez en los espumosos del norte de Italia
clima favorece la producción de vinos base para espumosos de alta calidad

steps.label: cause
steps.text: Grapes for sparkling base wine grow in a cool climate or at a cool high-altitude site.

steps.label: mechanism
steps.text: Cool temperatures slow sugar accumulation and preserve natural acidity during ripening.

steps.label: effect
steps.text: The base wine can combine high acidity, moderate alcohol, and fresh flavours suited to secondary fermentation and lees ageing.

steps.label: exam_formulation
steps.text: Formative causal formulation: The base wine can combine high acidity, moderate alcohol, and fresh flavours suited to secondary fermentation and lees ageing.

_meta.source_note: Inferred formative model - not official WSET assessment or mark-scheme content
